functions.name: createLocalWorkspace
params:
{
  season,
  rows,
  records,
  modifications,
  modHistory,
  baseRows,
  baseRecords,
  baseModificationEntries,
  baseModHistory,
  pendingOps = [],
  derivedSeasonal = null,
  entityVersions = {},
  serverEventHighWater,
  syncMeta,
}

callGraph.callee:
Object.entries(value as Record<string, unknown>)
    .filter(([, entryValue]) => entryValue !== undefined)
    .sort
input.pendingOps.filter((op): op is Extract<LocalPendingOp, { type: 'flightRecord' }> => op.type === 'flightRecord').map
input.pendingOps.filter((op): op is Extract<LocalPendingOp, { type: 'modification' }> => op.type === 'modification').map
input.pendingOps.filter((op): op is Extract<LocalPendingOp, { type: 'modificationDelete' }> => op.type === 'modificationDelete').map
input.pendingOps.filter((op): op is Extract<LocalPendingOp, { type: 'modHistory' }> => op.type === 'modHistory').map

Object.entries(value as Record<string, unknown>)
    .filter(([, entryValue]) => entryValue !== undefined)
    .sort

[
    record.sourceRowIndex ?? '',
    record.date ?? '',
    record.type ?? '',
    record.rawFlightNumber ?? record.flightNumber ?? '',
    record.route ?? '',
    record.schedule ?? '',
  ].join
